---
layout: cv
title: Resume: Isaac Bean
---
# Isaac Bean


<div id="webaddress">
<a href="isaac@applesdofall.org">isaac@applesdofall.org</a>
</div>


## Currently



### Specialized in



### Research interests

Geograpic Information Systems, Conservation Ecology, Deep Learning Models


## Education

`2023-2027`
__Brigham Young Universityo - Idaho__


## Occupation

`1600`
__Royal Mint__, London




<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
